items.title: Is Builder Confidence Set to Rebound on Looming Fed Rate Cuts?
items.description: Builder confidence stayed flat in September, but falling mortgage rates may spark a housing market rebound, with stocks like DHI, TOL, HD, LOW and MAS already gaining ground.

items.title: Analyst Says This is One of the Top Dividend Stocks to Buy for Interest Rate Cut Environment
items.description: Kevin Simpson, Capital Wealth Planning founder and CIO, said in a recent program on CNBC that he’s buying Home Depot (NYSE:HD) amid expectations of a rate cut. The analyst sees a new cycle of home renovation coming in the US. “I think it’s just as pure as a lower rate environment because if you think […]
